column1: # F3 (NAMES) in POINT — pick a previously-defined range name from a list.
# Manual: "After you select a command that prompts you for a range
# (for example, /Range Format or /Print [E,F,P] Range), press NAME (F3)
# to display a list of range names…"
# Here we use /Range Format Fixed: it prompts for decimals, then descends
# into POINT for the range. F3 in POINT opens the name picker, Enter
# selects, and the format applies to the selected range.
# Define a range name `block` over A1..A2.
# Pointer somewhere irrelevant — F3 in POINT must work regardless of position.
# /RFF → decimals prompt (default 2) → POINT → F3 → name list.
# Enter selects the highlighted (single) name and applies the format
# to A1..A2. We return to READY.
